observations.archetype_gloss: The integrated center of the psyche striving for wholeness and spiritual clarity
observations.summary: Dan is advised to 'make the vessel empty before you try to use it,' symbolizing his process of emptying himself of distractions and fears to achieve spiritual integration and readiness for transformation.

evidence.quote: "The last scrubbing is the one that matters, Dan. Do not fear the emptiness." Her eyes always fixed on something beyond the walls. "Make the vessel empty before you try to use it."
